div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 252px; height: 120px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 20px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; width: 250px; height: 120px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; width: 100%; height: 100%; white-space: nowrap;
div.p:
- name : string
- email : string
- calendar: Calendar
